name: accounting firms processing 10–20 clients/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 clients/month, frequent discrepancies cause delayed financial reporting. We automate bank statement reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Frequent discrepancies in bank reconciliations lead to delayed financial reporting.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Frequent discrepancies in bank reconciliations lead to delayed financial reporting.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For accounting firms processing 10–20 clients/month, frequent discrepancies cause delayed financial reporting. We automate bank statement reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes using spreadsheets.
